subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — it's great to hear there's interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

I'd be happy to arrange an introductory call this week. Could you let me know a few time slots that work for you (including your timezone)? I'll check availability on our end and confirm a time promptly.

Regarding the internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those details directly. However, once we've had our initial call and aligned on the scope of the collaboration, I can facilitate a proper introduction to the relevant decision-makers through the appropriate channels.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
